arts.ttl: Palmer admits he did not want Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has admitted he was ‘adamant’ he would not leave Manchester City for Chelsea prior to his transfer in 2023 and felt he would stay with his former club for life. He wanted to go out on loan because he knew he wasn’t going to play much.
